sizing_rule.note: Position sizing via Optimal f methodology conditional on statistical dependency analysis exceeding 95.45% confidence. Requires minimum 90-95 trades for analysis. Author silent on specific f value, Kelly fraction, and drawdown tolerance—implementation requires empirical calculation using formula X = 2*(Wins)*(Losses). Conditional sizing: only adjust position behavior when dependency confidence firmly established.

source_rule_text: Position sizing decisions should be based on statistical dependency analysis of trade sequences, requiring at least 95.45% confidence level to justify behavioral adjustments for substantial trading advantage.
